title: subworkflow - aws bedrock vpc reconcile network acl
description:
Bedrock-aware AWS remediation and orchestration subworkflow for vpc.

This workflow asks Amazon Bedrock for a remediation recommendation, executes AWS SSM automation, waits for completion, and verifies success.
It enforces non-fire-and-forget behavior through explicit wait and status-check tasks.
guide:
## 🤖 AWS Bedrock Remediation & Orchestration Subworkflow

### 🎯 Purpose
- Reconcile network ACL drift causing packet drops

### 🧠 Bedrock Collaboration
- 📣 Sends incident context to Bedrock using AWS CLI via SSM Run Command
- 📝 Uses Bedrock response as advisory context before remediation

### ▶️ Execution Behavior
- ▶️ Run Bedrock recommendation command on an orchestrator EC2 host
- ⏳ Wait and validate command completion
- ▶️ Start AWS SSM Automation runbook
- ⏳ Wait for automation execution via helper subworkflow
- ✅ Verify automation terminal status is SUCCESS

### 📋 Default Runbook
- **AWSSupport-ReconcileVpcNetworkAcl**

### 🔗 Dependency
- 📎 Requires **subworkflow - aws bedrock wait for systems manager document execution**

bedrock-send-command.description: Invoke Amazon Bedrock recommendation via SSM command.

bedrock-command-status.name: bedrock-command-status
bedrock-command-status.description: Poll status of Bedrock advisory command.

check-bedrock-command-status.name: check-bedrock-command-status
check-bedrock-command-status.description: Ensure Bedrock advisory command completed successfully.

start-remediation-automation.name: start-remediation-automation
start-remediation-automation.description: Start AWS remediation or orchestration automation runbook.

wait-for-remediation-completed.name: wait-for-remediation-completed
wait-for-remediation-completed.description: Wait for remediation automation execution completion.
